scope: Port the completed-tool batch summary label generator onto AgenC provider primitives.

requiredBehaviors: empty tool batches return null without invoking the provider
each completed tool is represented with name, input JSON, and output JSON
tool input and output JSON are truncated to 300 characters before prompting
the last assistant text is included as optional user-intent context and bounded to 200 characters
the provider call uses the fixed summary-label system prompt, a Haiku-class default model, no tools, no parallel tool calls, and the caller abort signal
non-empty provider text is trimmed and returned, while blank output returns null
generation failures are non-fatal, logged with E_TOOL_USE_SUMMARY_GENERATION_FAILED, and return null
edgeCases: unserializable tool inputs and outputs are represented as an explicit serialization failure marker
non-interactive sessions use a distinct prompt-cache key but still generate through the same provider path
